claims.claim: Arman Tsarukyan possesses high-level wrestling ability.
A significant size difference exists between Henry Cejudo and Arman Tsarukyan.
claims.quote: Of course, there's a big size difference.

claims.claim: Henry Cejudo is more tactical in his wrestling approach than he was in his mixed martial arts career.
claims.quote: I'm a lot more tactical as much as I was even in mixed martial arts.

claims.claim: Taking a three-year hiatus from competition makes a successful comeback in combat sports extremely difficult.
claims.quote: I would never take 3 years in both sports and try to make a comeback.

claims.claim: Dricus Du Plessis is a very large middleweight who physically resembles a light heavyweight on fight day.
claims.quote: Dricus Du Plessis, he's a big dude, man. He's a big 85er. He almost looks like a 205er coming in when it comes to actual fight day.

claims.claim: Dricus Du Plessis struggled with his recovery in his fight against Khamzat Chimaev.
claims.quote: the last fight that I saw with him and him and Khamzat Chimaev there was the recovery was not there.

claims.claim: Dricus Du Plessis's cardio was exhausted by wrestling in his fight against Khamzat Chimaev.
claims.quote: it was the wrestling that really exhausted him.

claims.claim: Dricus Du Plessis outstruck Sean Strickland in their second fight by diversifying his striking and level changes.
claims.quote: it was level changing, kicking, punching, diversifying his punches.

claims.claim: Kamaru Usman will have a recovery advantage over Dricus Du Plessis at 185 pounds.
claims.quote: The key part and the and and I guess the part that you're going to have more of advantage is how do you recover at 185 lb?

claims.claim: Dricus du Plessis outstruck Sean Strickland in their second fight through superior level changing, kicking, punching, and diversification.
claims.quote: It was just it was level changing, kicking, punching, diversifying his punches.

claims.claim: Herb Dean's decision to separate Kamaru Usman and Leon Edwards while Usman was active against the cage negatively impacted Usman's performance.
claims.quote: you were against the cage and you were being active and what did Herb Dean do? He removed you from Edwards and then boom that infamous kick happened.

claims.claim: Trevor's gloves are designed to prevent fighters from extending their fingers, which would reduce the frequency of deep eye pokes.
claims.quote: these gloves are phenomenal gloves and it will allow for fighters not to lose anything. We'll continue to be as as as tough and as dangerous and the shots still you still absorb them and impact them the way that they have, but at the same time it kind gives us a little bit as far as putting your fin

claims.claim: Eye pokes are caused by a fighter's passive mindset and lack of aggression, rather than the design of the gloves.
claims.quote: What causes the eye pokes is some little little [ __ ] inside [music] that's like being passive and I'm avoiding the fight and not being aggressive.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's ability to maintain his balance remains intact despite his long layoff.
claims.quote: every time I saw Conor shadow box or when I saw Conor in the gym working, he still had the balance.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's speed remains intact despite his long layoff.
claims.quote: You can see the speed is still there.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff from competition.
claims.quote: It's 5 years, Conor. It's not 2 years. It's not 3 years. It's not 4 years. It's 5 years, man.

claims.claim: Max Holloway can win by controlling the distance and utilizing kicks to fatigue Conor McGregor.
claims.quote: if Max plays the distance game a little bit and kicks Conor a little bit and gets some kind of a fatigue he's in trouble, dude.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's primary path to victory is patience and countering with his left hand.
claims.quote: Conor really does have to be patient maybe take a couple of shots to eventually counter him with that beautiful with that beautiful left

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's ability to perform under the emotional pressure of a large crowd is a significant question mark.
claims.quote: I think that's what the big test is going to be. It's how do you deal with the emotions You're surrounded by 20, 25,000 people screaming and cheering.
